data.Description (en): Karura is the decentralized financial hub of Kusama, a scalable multi-chain network for radical innovation. Karura is a sister network to Acala and offers a suite of financial primitives, including a trustless staking derivative (liquid KSM), a multi-collateralized stablecoin backed by cross-chain assets (kUSD), and an AMM DEX.
data.Description (zh): Karura 是 Kusama 的去中心化金融中心，Kusama 是一个用于激进创新的可扩展多链网络。Karura 是 Acala 的姐妹网络，提供一套金融原语，包括无需信任的质押衍生品（Liquid KSM）、由跨链资产支持的多抵押稳定币（kUSD）和 AMM DEX。
